message:
fix(sync): improve exception safety in barrier/notify primitives

Fix subtle invariant violations in barrier waiter insertion and broadcast
notification filtering that could corrupt state under allocation failure
or cancellation.

Barrier changes:
- Reorder BarrierWaitFuture::poll() to read waker before acquiring
  mutable state
- Perform fallible push() before committing counter updates (arrived,
  next_waiter_id) so OOM leaves state consistent without partial
  increments

Notify changes:
- Fix WaiterSlab::insert() to perform allocation before incrementing
  active counter, preventing counter mismatch on allocation failure
- Fix Notify::notify_all() to check generation before processing
  waiters: was processing all waiters regardless of generation, causing
  double-notification; now only processes waiters with generation <
  new_generation, preventing cancelled broadcast waiters from being
  incorrectly converted to notify_one tokens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
